languages.text: {n}Преступник скалится, косясь на вас. Его лицо искажает новая судорога, но до рук она не доходит: дуло плазменного пистолета все так же неподвижно смотрит в голову генетора. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} издает тихую бинарную трель.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Преступник скалится, косясь на вас. Его лицо искажает новая судорога, но до рук она не доходит: дуло мельта-пистолета все так же неподвижно смотрит в голову генетора. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} издает тихую бинарную трель.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Преступник скалится, косясь на вас. Его лицо искажает новая судорога, но до рук она не доходит: дуло плазменного пистолета все так же неподвижно смотрит в голову генетора. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} издает тихую бинарную трель.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. A new spasm contorts his face, but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binary trill.{/n}

{n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. A new spasm contorts his face, but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binary trill.{/n}

{n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

{n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Kriminelle starrt dich mit einem höhnischen Grinsen an. Ein weiterer Krampf verzerrt sein Gesicht, erreicht aber nicht seine Hände. Die Mündung der Plasmapistole ist weiterhin auf den Kopf des Genetors gerichtet. Der {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} stößt ein binhärisches Trillern aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Kriminelle starrt dich mit einem höhnischen Grinsen an. Ein weiterer Krampf verzerrt sein Gesicht, erreicht aber nicht seine Hände. Die Mündung der Plasmapistole ist weiterhin auf den Kopf des Genetors gerichtet. Der {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} stößt ein binhärisches Trillern aus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le criminel ricane en vous lançant un regard noir. Un nouveau spasme déforme son visage, mais épargne ses mains : le canon du pistolet à plasma reste braqué sur la tête du genetor. Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} émet un trille binhaire.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le criminel ricane en vous lançant un regard noir. Un nouveau spasme déforme son visage, mais épargne ses mains : le canon du pistolet à plasma reste braqué sur la tête du genetor. Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} émet un trille binhaire.{/n}

languages.text: {n}罪犯冷笑一声，怒视着你。他的脸又抽搐了一下，但手上依然纹丝未动：等离子手枪的枪口依旧死死顶着基因士的脑袋。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}发出一声二进制颤音。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}罪犯冷笑一声，怒视着你。他的脸又抽搐了一下，但手上依然纹丝未动：等离子手枪的枪口依旧死死顶着基因士的脑袋。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}发出一声二进制颤音。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El criminal te fulmina con la mirada, haciendo una mueca desdeñosa. Otro espasmo sacude su rostro, pero no afecta a sus manos. El cañón de la pistola de plasma sigue apretado contra la cabeza del genetor. El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} emite un trino binario.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El criminal te fulmina con la mirada, haciendo una mueca desdeñosa. Otro espasmo sacude su rostro, pero no afecta a sus manos. El cañón de la pistola de plasma sigue apretado contra la cabeza del genetor. El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} emite un trino binario.{/n}

languages.text: {n}犯人は嘲笑し、あなたを睨みつける。プラズマピストルの銃口はジェネターの頭に固定されたままだ。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} はバイナリー・トリルを発する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. A new spasm contorts his face, but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binary trill.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Suçlu sana ters ters bakarak alaycı bir şekilde gülümsüyor. Yüzünü buruşturan bir başka spazm, ellerine ulaşmıyor. Plazma tabancasının namlusu, Genetör'ün kafasına sabitlenmiş hâlde kalıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g} ikilidil bir uğultu yayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The criminal sneers, glaring at you. Another spasm contorts his face but does not reach his hands: the muzzle of the plasma pistol remains fixed on the Genetor's head. The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} emits a binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Suçlu sana ters ters bakarak alaycı bir şekilde gülümsüyor. Yüzünü buruşturan bir başka spazm, ellerine ulaşmıyor. Plazma tabancasının namlusu, Genetör'ün kafasına sabitlenmiş hâlde kalıyor. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g} ikilidil bir uğultu yayıyor.{/n}
